problem_observed: Physical-infrastructure themes can turn into generic beneficiary baskets before geography regulation and bottleneck ownership are mapped.
proposed_patch: Add compact fields for region demand source bottleneck type regulator/funder public-market exposure evidence status and disconfirmation metric.
next_validation: Test on one more infrastructure or logistics theme; then decide whether to add as overlay reference.
adoption_bar: Adopt only if it prevents premature stock handoff in at least two real cases without adding long-form process text.
retirement_condition: Retire if it duplicates industry map fields or slows non-infrastructure themes.

problem_observed: Healthcare themes can collapse approval clinical evidence guidance access pricing and adoption assumptions into one thesis.
proposed_patch: Add compact bridge from regulatory status and label constraints to patient access adoption persistence supply price/margin conversion and disconfirmation metric.
next_validation: Deepen GLP-1 into LLY/NVO expectation maps or test another healthcare/medtech case.
adoption_bar: Adopt only if it prevents approval-to-adoption overreach and improves refresh/disconfirmation paths in at least two cases.
retirement_condition: Retire if standard claim taxonomy already handles the issue without a healthcare-specific bridge.

problem_observed: Financial-regulatory themes can turn legal/regulatory facts into implied issuer winners before implementation and economics are mapped.
proposed_patch: Add compact bridge from legal event and implementing authority to eligible actors permitted economics adoption channel compliance/reserve cost company exposure path and disconfirmation metric.
next_validation: Convert into a concise reference only after source-link QA and one deeper company-level case beyond CRCL.
adoption_bar: Adopt only if it prevents law-to-winner overreach and improves company handoff in at least two cases.
retirement_condition: Retire if it duplicates existing macro-regime transmission fields or creates unnecessary process for simple policy notes.
